$comment: Classification of Cloudflare/Vercel workspaces. Checked by tools/check-workers.mjs. railsBacked: OpenNext apps with the Rails VPC binding. contentSurface: OpenNext apps that must NOT carry the VPC binding until they actually fetch from Rails (add the binding and a per-frame rails-client copy together). standalone: Hono apex workers, no Rails. external: Vercel-hosted, no wrangler config.
